title: ServiceTypeValues
description: A Classification value that distinguishes between the type of services

x-enumeration-literals.name: IT Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that provides technology capabilities, system support, infrastructure, or technical operations to enable business and operational activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Administrative Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that supports organizational management, coordination, record keeping, compliance, or administrative operational activities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: System Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that provides system-level operational capabilities, processing, integration, control, or technical support functions within an operational environment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that provides financial products, financial processing, monetary transactions, or related financial management activities to customers or institutions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Information Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that provides, manages, processes, distributes, or supports access to operational, business, or analytical information.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: A Service that delivers operational business capabilities, customer-facing functions, or organizational activities that support business objectives and processes.
